title: Helios Maintenance Rebaseline Request
description: Request for the front controller to perform an internal rebaseline during protected drift.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this maintenance request.

created_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the request was created.

expires_utc.description: UTC timestamp after which this request is no longer valid.

base_manifest_hash.description: SHA256 of the current manifest JSON. Must match the sidecar hash at request time.

expected_drift_paths.description: Relative paths of protected files expected to have drifted. Must match actual drift exactly.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the maintenance rebaseline.

write_mode.description: Must be 'front_controller_internal_rebaseline'. Confirms the rebaseline is performed by the front controller, not an external tool.
